class.name: NestedMarkup
class.description:
This class tests various markup patterns: - [b]Bold text[/b] - [i]Italic text[/i] - [code]inline code[/code] - [url=https://example.com]Link text[/url] - Nested: [b][i]bold italic[/i][/b]
Code blocks: [codeblock] func _ready(): print("Hello, World!") var x = 10 if x > 5: print("Greater than 5") [/codeblock]
Lists and other complex markup should be preserved.
